calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
RESPONDENT BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE - The court treats this demurrer as a motion for judgment on the pleadings and grants the motion without leave to amend. See CCP 438(c)(3)(B)(ii). The action is time barred under Gov't Code sec. 11523 and petitioner fails to explain how it can amend the petition to cure the defect. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Continued To Mar-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is continued to March 10, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 13, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The Court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Continued To Feb-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
